name: fresh-take
description: Independent stronger-model second opinion at key moments — stuck debugging or an imminent irreversible action. /fresh-take:consult composes a facts-only brief (no leaning) and dispatches a blind opus consultant with read-only repo access; it returns a Take, Risks, and one Alternative. A UserPromptSubmit reminder hook nudges the command on key-moment phrases. Advice only — it never blocks, gates, or edits anything.
